summary: Albert Park, Chief Economist at the Asian Development Bank, discusses the bank’s latest APAC growth outlook. The forecast sees growth staying subdued despite a modest improvement, as disruptions from the Middle East conflict continue to weigh on supply chains and production costs. He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Wayfair Has Built AI Into Its Future
title_cn: Wayfair 如何将人工智能融入未来
summary: Furniture and home goods retailer Wayfair has built a thriving e-commerce platform that's been incorporating advanced technologies throughout its 25-year history. On Bloomberg Chief Future Officer, CFO Kate Gulliver tells Carol Massar how the company is now using AI to improve the customer experience and enhance internal business processes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wayfair's Big Bet on Bricks and Mortar
title_cn: Wayfair 对实体店的大赌注
summary: Wayfair is building on its success as an e-commerce furniture and home goods retailer with a move into large-format brick-and-mortar stores. On Bloomberg Chief Future Officer, CFO Kate Gulliver shows Carol Massar around Wayfair's new Atlanta store, and explains how this new initiative is helping the company create a seamless omnichannel "clicks to bricks" shopping experience. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iluvatar CoreX Raises $902 Million After 257% Stock Rally

title: IMF Raises S. Korea Growth Most Among Major Economies on AI Boom

summary: South Korea’s growth outlook received the biggest upgrade among the world’s 30 major economies in the International Monetary Fund’s latest projections, adding to evidence that the country’s artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom is overpowering the economic hit from the Middle East conflict.

title: AI Costs Lead Westpac to Prod Staff Toward ‘Sensible’ Model Use
title_cn: 人工智能成本导致西太平洋银行鼓励员工“合理”使用模型
summary: Westpac Banking Corp. is intensifying efforts to monitor artificial intelligence costs, as the Australian lender closely tracks AI tokens across the firm and routes simpler tasks to cheaper models.

title: China to Let AI Firms Buy Nvidia H200s, Information Says
title_cn: 有消息称，中国将允许人工智能公司购买 Nvidia H200
summary: China plans to allow top artificial intelligence companies to buy a limited amount of H200 chips from Nvidia Corp., a sign the country is easing restrictions on the coveted US technology, according to the Information.

title: Nvidia Rival Positron Holds Talks to Raise Funds at $5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Nvidia 竞争对手 Positron 举行融资谈判，估值达 50 亿美元
summary: AI chip startup Positron is in talks to raise about $750 million in financing during a round with two phases, part of a groundswell of companies looking to compete with Nvidia Corp.

title: Nasdaq 100 Fluctuates Amid Geopolitical Tensions | The Close 7/8/2026
title_cn: 纳斯达克 100 指数在地缘政治紧张局势中波动 |收盘价 7/8/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Nuveen Head of Fixed Income Strategy Tony Rodriguez, State Street Global Head of Gold Strategy Aakash Doshi, Coresight Research Founder & CEO Deborah Weinswig, Principal Venture Partners Founder & Managing Partner Songyee Yoon, Alphasimplex Chief Research Strategist Katy Kaminski, Principal Asset Management Chief Investment Officer & Global Head of Equities George Maris, Morgan Stanley Equity Research Managing Director Alex Straton, MNTN CEO Mark Douglas, & Former HUD Sectretary Henry Cisneros.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Early-Stage VC Founder: AI Race Is Now About Efficiency
title_cn: 早期风险投资创始人：AI竞赛现在关乎效率
summary: In this segment, Songyee Yoon, Director on HP's Board and Founder of Principal Venture Partners, discusses the emerging divergence between the chip cycle and the hyperscaler cycle amid the AI build-out. She highlights the critical issue of whether hyperscalers will reduce their spending as the costs of AI infrastructure escalate, a factor that could significantly impact the broader AI investment landscape and equity market performance. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta to Build First Data Center in Canada, Expanding Global Fleet
title_cn: Meta 将在加拿大建立第一个数据中心，扩大全球机队
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. will invest around $10 billion to build its first data center in Canada as the company expands its infrastructure to support its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: MNTN CEO: We’re Over-Building Data Centers in the US
title_cn: MNTN首席执行官：我们在美国过度建设数据中心
summary: Mark Douglas, CEO of the ad tech company MNTN, discussed Meta's reported ambitions to expand beyond advertising into cloud infrastructure. Douglas expressed skepticism about Meta's ability to compete with established cloud providers like AWS and Google Cloud, citing high switching costs for customers and Meta's lack of excess AI infrastructure capacity to monetize. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Deals 7/8/2026
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Paul Weiss Global Co-head of M&A Krish Veeraraghavan and Alix Partners Partner & Managing Director Grace Lee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Judge Allows SEC-Musk Deal Despite ‘Significant Misgivings’
title_cn: 尽管存在“重大疑虑”，美国法官仍允许 SEC 与马斯克达成交易
summary: A US judge signed off on Elon Musk paying $1.5 million to end a Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit that accused him of cheating Twitter Inc. investors when he missed a deadline in 2022 to disclose his growing stake in the company.

title: Apple’s Chip Deal With Broadcom Expected to Top $30 Billion
title_cn: 苹果与博通的芯片交易预计将突破 300 亿美元
summary: Apple Inc., following through on a pledge to boost spending on US-made components, said its expanded agreement with Broadcom Inc. is expected to top $30 billion.

title: India’s JioStar Taps AI for Shopping, TV Movie Night Ideas
title_cn: 印度 JioStar 利用人工智能实现购物、电视电影之夜创意
summary: JioStar is betting that conversations with viewers powered by generative AI will become a powerful tool for the streaming TV company.

title: BofA Bankers U-Turn on OpenAI
title_cn: 美国银行银行家对 OpenAI 掉头
summary:
Bloomberg's Liana Baker joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Bank of America handed a $520 million credit line to OpenAI in recent weeks after previously spurning the artificial intelligence giant’s request, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sonos Cuts Top Design and Product Executives as Part of Layoffs
title_cn: 作为裁员的一部分，Sonos 裁减了顶级设计和产品主管
summary: Sonos Inc. has pushed out some of its top design and product management executives as part of job cuts in recent weeks, raising questions about the company’s ability to develop breakthrough products beyond its short-term hardware road map of safe bets.

title: Merz Warns Germany Risks ‘the Abyss’ as Far Right Gains Ground
title_cn: 默茨警告极右翼势力扩张德国面临“深渊”风险
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Germany’s traditional parties are pushing through crucial reforms to the social welfare system as he warned that the rise of extremist parties risks sending the country “into the abyss.”

title: Ukraine Hits Two More Tankers in Russia as Kyiv Expands Attacks
title_cn: 随着基辅扩大袭击范围，乌克兰又在俄罗斯击中两艘油轮
summary: Ukrainian drones hit two more tankers in southern Russia as Kyiv expands the scope of its attacks, targeting vessels bringing fuel to the region amid a nationwide gasoline shortage.

title: Trump Says Spain Agreed to Pay More
title_cn: 特朗普称西班牙同意支付更多费用
summary: US President Donald Trump said Spain, a NATO partner, agreed to pay more after he threatened them with a trade embargo during the bloc’s summit. Trump didn’t specify what payments he was referring to or who he spoke with from Spain. Oliver Crook reports from Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Becomes the Trump-Erdogan Show and Everyone Gets a Gun
title_cn: 北约成为特朗普-埃尔多安秀，每个人都有枪
summary: Donald Trump told NATO leaders he was feeling the love at the end of a two-day summit in Ankara.

title: Iran War: US Strikes Iran for Second Day | Daybreak Europe 7/9/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：美国连续第二天袭击伊朗|黎明欧洲 7/9/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, the US carried out a second day of strikes on Iran. US Central Command says around 90 targets were hit. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps says it struck US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. Asked if a full-scale military campaign would resume, US President Donald Trump said, “I don’t know,” but it would be won “very quickly.”

Minutes from the Fed's June meeting show that 'a few' officials said there was a case for raising interest rates, though they ultimately supported the decision to stay on hold. 

Today's guest: Trevor Charsley, Corpay, Senior Technical Strategist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Speedboat Racer’s Startup Is Europe’s Newest Defense Unicorn
title_cn: 前快艇运动员的初创公司是欧洲最新的国防独角兽
summary: Mal Crease spent years breaking records as a speedboat racer before forming a company to build boats without crews. Now his firm, Kraken Technology Group, is the latest European defense startup worth north of $1 billion.

title: India and Australia Clinch Energy, Security Deals to Deepen Ties
title_cn: 印度和澳大利亚达成能源、安全协议以深化关系
summary: India and Australia clinched deals ranging from energy to defense on Thursday, taking their bilateral relationship to a new level in response to growing concern over security in the Indo-Pacific.

title: How a Man Wearing a Trash Can May Expose Farage’s Weakness
title_cn: 一个戴着垃圾桶的男人如何暴露法拉奇的弱点
summary: Nigel Farage intended his shock decision to quit Parliament and seek reelection in his coastal seat as a demonstration of political strength. But a man wearing a rubbish bin could end up showing the depth of antipathy to the Reform UK leader.

title: EU Finance Ministers Meet to Discuss Energy Shock, AI
title_cn: 欧盟财长开会讨论能源冲击和人工智能
summary: European Union finance ministers are gathering in Brussels for a Eurogroup meeting. Bloomberg's Suzanne Lynch breaks down what key topics are likely to be discussed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crosby on Far Right, Iran War, US Mid-Term Impact
title_cn: 克罗斯比谈极右翼、伊朗战争、美国中期影响
summary:
CT Group Co-Founder & Executive Chairman Sir Lynton Crosby addresses the surge of voters moving far right, warning of destabilizing consequences for democracies worldwide. He also discussed the potential fallout of a war with Iran, noting its ripple effects on the US mid-term elections and the fragile balance of American politics. 
He speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Strikes Iran for Second Straight Day
title_cn: 美国连续第二天袭击伊朗
summary: The US struck Iran for the second straight day in an escalation of violence that threatens efforts to reach a permanent peace deal. The attacks came just hours after President Donald Trump at the NATO summit said the US would probably target Iran again. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Charges Put India’s Most Notorious Gangster in Spotlight
title_cn: 美国的指控让印度最臭名昭著的黑帮成为焦点
summary: A sweeping US dragnet of Indian crime syndicates has brought renewed attention to one of the country’s most notorious crime bosses and his alleged role in carrying out political killings overseas, including of a well-known Sikh activist in Canada.

title: Conspiracies, Lies and US Influencers Drive UK Street Violence
title_cn: 阴谋、谎言和美国影响者推动英国街头暴力
summary: How anger and resentment are being manipulated online and weaponized across the UK

title: US Military Launches Strikes on Iran for Second Straight Day
title_cn: 美军连续第二天对伊朗发动袭击
summary: The US military struck Iran for the second straight day, an escalation of violence that threatens efforts to reach a permanent peace deal.

title: Platner Drops Maine Senate Bid After Sexual Assault Allegation
title_cn: 普拉特纳在性侵犯指控后放弃缅因州参议院竞选
summary:
Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse.

His exit throws a crucial race for the party into turmoil. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand Aims to Join Military Alliance With Australia, Fiji
title_cn: 新西兰拟与澳大利亚、斐济建立军事联盟
summary: New Zealand will work to join a new military alliance that was signed this week between Australia and Fiji, the latest move in the rapid restructuring of the regional security architecture.

title: Talarico’s $30 Million Haul Crushes Paxton in Texas Senate Race
title_cn: 塔拉里科 (Talarico) 3000 万美元的收入在德克萨斯州参议员竞选中击败帕克斯顿 (Paxton)
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico received $30 million in second-quarter donations in his campaign for US Senate, more than tripling the amount Republican challenger Ken Paxton amassed in what will be one of the most expensive campaigns of the November midterm elections.

title: Democratic Infighting Puts Party’s Midterm Targets at Risk
title_cn: 民主内斗使党的中期目标面临风险
summary: With President Donald Trump and Republicans on the defensive over the cost of groceries, gasoline, housing and healthcare, Democrats expected to spend the summer building momentum ahead of the midterm elections.

title: Platner Suspends Maine Senate Bid After Assault Allegation
title_cn: 袭击指控后普拉特纳暂停缅因州参议院竞选
summary: Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse, throwing a crucial race for the party into turmoil.

title: Anutin Awaits Thai Court Ruling on $12 Billion Crisis Funding
title_cn: 阿努丁等待泰国法院对 120 亿美元危机资金的裁决
summary: Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul is awaiting a crucial court ruling over whether roughly $12 billion of crisis borrowing is constitutional or not, a decision that could determine the fate of his flagship economic stimulus and energy transition agendas.

title: Trump Says US Not Stopping Machado’s Return to Venezuela
title_cn: 特朗普称美国不会阻止马查多返回委内瑞拉
summary: President Donald Trump denied preventing Venezuelan opposition leader María Corina Machado from returning to her country after the recent devastating earthquakes, a move that could pose a direct challenge to acting President Delcy Rodríguez.

title: Platner Campaign Revs Up Maine Backers for Fight on Replacement
title_cn: 普拉特纳竞选活动动员缅因州支持者为替代斗争而奋斗
summary: Maine US Senate candidate Graham Platner’s campaign began mobilizing his supporters for a potential struggle over choosing a replacement Democratic nominee as he faces mounting pressure to drop out of the election in the wake of a sexual assault allegation.

title: Trump Says Troop Levels in Europe Will Depend on Greenland, Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称欧洲驻军人数将取决于格陵兰岛和伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump said a decision on US troop levels in Europe would hinge on how allies addressed his concerns over Greenland and the Iran war, comments likely to intensify NATO members’ worries about over his commitment to collective security.

title: Trump Returns on Old AF1 Instead of Qatari Jet | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/08/2026
title_cn: 特朗普乘坐旧款AF1而不是卡塔尔喷气机返回权力平衡：最新版 07/08/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Former US Ambassador to NATO Kurt Volker reacts to the second round of strikes against Iran, saying the MOU with Tehran was "never" the end-all-be-all. Jim Messina, founder and CEO of The Messina Group and manager of the Obama 2012 re-election campaign, says Graham Platner's "career in politics is done" after months of turmoil surrounding his campaign and sexual assault allegations that Platner has denied. Retired US Air Force Lieutenant General David Deptula says President Trump's renewed strikes against Iran are "not necessarily escalatory," but rather a "smart reaction" meant to make clear to Tehran that violations of any agreement will "make its situation worse". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Urges Latin American Countries to Raise Defense Budget
title_cn: 五角大楼敦促拉丁美洲国家增加国防预算
summary: The US Department of Defense is pressuring Latin American nations to increase security spending to fight organized crime.

title: Ret. Lt. Gen.: Trump's Iran Strikes a 'Smart Reaction'
title_cn: 退休。中将：特朗普领导下的伊朗做出了“明智的反应”
summary: Retired US Air Force Lieutenant General David Deptula says President Trump's renewed strikes against Iran are "not necessarily escalatory," but rather a "smart reaction" meant to make clear to Tehran that violations of any agreement will "make its situation worse". He also reacts to President Trump's move to return home from Turkey on an older Air Force One, saying the decision likely reflected security, survivability, communications and operational caution. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
